name: zvideo_texture_pixel_pack_setup_from_masks
description: zVideo::TexturePixelPack_SetupFromMasks initializes texture RGB/A pixel-pack masks, bit counts, packed shift totals, shifted RGB masks, and the inverse non-RGB shifted mask.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob1 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 124 unmasked mismatches after masking 64 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 202 bytes and the VC object body is 208 bytes with 5 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.

The reviewed failure is register allocation and instruction scheduling drift in the inline shifted-mask expressions and final inverse-mask reduction; the source body is leaf fastcall and has no visible direct callees.
The native smoke verifies 4:4:4:4 texture bit counts, RGB bit totals, blue shift-to-8 state, shifted RGB masks, and non-RGB shifted mask state.
